name: autoimprove
description: Autonomous codebase improvement loop — modify code, evaluate against benchmarks, keep or discard via git worktree isolation

interface.longDescription: Autoimprove proposes changes in isolated worktrees, evaluates them against your gates and metrics, and keeps only non-regressing improvements.
defaultPrompt: Set up autoimprove for this repository and scaffold the benchmark config.
Run a 3-experiment autoimprove session focused on failing tests.
Summarize the last autoimprove session and explain what was kept or discarded.
